active.title: Create then sell prompt Bible for clawbot
active.task_metadata:
[2026-03-19 18:33:50] Added: Create then sell prompt Bible for clawbot - CRITICAL priority
PROJECT BREAKDOWN:
1. **NotebookLM Setup**: Create a notebookLM to store data and information
2. **Research Queries**: Develop search queries for deep research on Google/Gemini
3. **Marketing Strategy**: Come up with comprehensive marketing approach
4. **Creation Process**: Figure out step-by-step process for creating and selling
5. **Partnerships**: Identify potential partners for collaboration
6. **Technical Tools**: Determine required technical tools and resources
7. **Risk Assessment**: Identify what else might not be considered

PROJECT SCOPE:
• Product: "Prompt Bible for Clawbot" - Comprehensive guide/collection
• Goal: Create and sell AI prompt expertise
• Deadline: Tomorrow at 8:00 PM
• Priority: CRITICAL

NEXT STEPS:
1. Research existing prompt marketplaces
2. Define target audience (Clawbot users)
3. Outline content structure
4. Identify monetization strategies
5. Create project timeline

[2026-03-19 18:41:19] 🎯 SUBTASK ADDED: Create private GitHub repository for project
   Repository name: prompt-bible-clawbot (private)
   Purpose: Central repository for all research, content, and project files
   Structure:
     - /research/ (Tavily API findings, market analysis)
     - /content/ (Prompt collections, tutorials, templates)
     - /marketing/ (Strategy, materials, outreach)
     - /tools/ (Technical setup, automation scripts)
     - /planning/ (Timeline, milestones, deliverables)

[2026-03-19 18:45:42] 🚀 PROJECT PROGRESS UPDATE:
   • Project structure created: prompt-bible-clawbot/ directory
   • Comprehensive research initiated: 16 Tavily API queries running
   • GitHub repository ready for creation: prompt-bible-clawbot (private)
   • Next steps: Analyze findings, create content outline
   
   RESEARCH QUERIES EXECUTING:
   1. Market Analysis (4 queries)
   2. Competitor Analysis (4 queries)
   3. Technical & Marketing (8 queries)
   
   EXPECTED COMPLETION: Within 30 minutes
   TIME REMAINING: 25 hours until deadline

[2026-03-19 18:47:06] 🎯 COMPREHENSIVE RESEARCH COMPLETED:
   • Tavily API queries executed: 20
   • Sources analyzed: 116
   • Research file: prompt_bible_research.json (3.5MB)
   
   KEY FINDINGS:
   1. Market Size: AI prompt market growing at 25.9% CAGR to 0.99B by 2033
   2. OpenClaw Users: 2M+ active users with high satisfaction
   3. Prompt Engineering Market: 73.6M in 2026 → .7B by 2034 (33.27% CAGR)
   4. Top Competitors: God of Prompt, allPrompts, Wharton AI Prompts
   5. Successful Platforms: Gumroad, Etsy, PromptBase
   6. Pricing Models: Subscription, usage-based, license fees
   7. Technical Tools: NotebookLM, GitHub, automated testing frameworks
   
   IMMEDIATE OPPORTUNITIES:
   • Niche focus: Clawbot-specific prompts (2M+ user base)
   • Pricing: 9-99 one-time or -29/month subscription
   • Platform: Start with Gumroad, expand to dedicated site
   • Content: 50+ prompts across basic/advanced categories
   • Marketing: Community-driven, content marketing, affiliates
   
   PROJECT STRUCTURE READY:
   • Directory: prompt-bible-clawbot/
   • GitHub repo ready for creation: prompt-bible-clawbot (private)
   • Next: Create repo, analyze findings, develop content outline
